title: TRANS PARENT & YOUTH DEFENSE
description: Legal and navigation support for trans parents facing custody discrimination and LGBTQ+ youth navigating family instability or hostile foster environments.

title: CPS DEFENSE NETWORK
description: Rapid-response navigation and legal advocacy for families targeted by Child Protective Services, fighting state separation and prioritizing community-based kinship care.

title: REPRODUCTIVE JUSTICE ADVOCACY
description: Fighting for bodily autonomy, access to gender-affirming care, and comprehensive reproductive healthcare without state surveillance, coercion, or criminalization.

title: MANDATORY REPORTER REFORM
description: Training educators and healthcare providers on the disproportionate harms of the family regulation system on marginalized communities, advocating for support over surveillance.

title: CHRT: FAMILY SEPARATION
description: Documenting civil rights violations, coercion, and discrimination within the child welfare and foster care systems to build an evidentiary record for legislative reform.
